text.title: rag-eval-test-set-generation Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree for rag-eval-test-set-generation application; concludes with rule-id refs or skip.

decision-tree.root-question: Does a recent (<= 90d) labeled test set already cover all query types?

branch.conclusion: Reuse the existing set; do not regenerate.
Add hard cases to the existing set.
Generate full set from real logs + synthetic mix.

example.description: Greenfield RAG launch — generate the full set from 50% real logs + 50% LLM-synthesised hard cases.
